summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2.7 Deal Calculator Panel. All backend endpoints (13/13) and frontend components verified. Tested: calculation CRUD, versioning/cloning, status transitions, overrides, compare, timeline, comments (internal/shared), public share/approve flow, and manager notifications.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/calculations creates snapshot with deal_id linkage, version auto-increment, share_token generation
Backend: POST /api/calculations/{id}/clone creates new version with parent_id set and version incremented (v3→v4)
Backend: PATCH /api/calculations/{id}/status validates state machine (draft→sent_to_client allowed)
Backend: PATCH /api/calculations/{id}/overrides updates discount and recomputes total correctly
Backend: GET /api/calculations-compare?a=&b= returns 13 rows with delta per row and delta_total=-500
Backend: GET /api/calculations/{id}/timeline returns 4+ chronological events (created, status transitions, version, comment)
Backend: POST /api/calculations/{id}/comments creates shared comment visible to manager
Backend: GET /api/calculations/{id}/comments role-filters correctly (manager sees shared comments)
Backend: GET /api/public/calculations/share/{token} returns client-visible rows only, strips internal fields (deal_id, created_by)
Backend: POST /api/public/calculations/share/{token}/approve transitions to approved_by_client, creates notification, emits deal_event
Backend: GET /api/notifications/me returns calculation_approved notification for manager
Frontend: /admin/legal?tab=calculations renders Calculations (P2.7) tab with active styling
Frontend: Deal selector populates with 4 deals, auto-selects deal_test_customer_001_3
Frontend: Version list displays 6 versions (v1-v6) with status badges (Draft, Approved, Auction mode, Sent to client)
Frontend: Version cards show totals (€20,684-€26,536) and deltas vs previous version (€-500, €+€500, €-€5,352, €+€1,200)
Frontend: 'New version' button present and functional
Frontend: Status transition buttons present (Sent to client, Auction mode, Archived) - validated state machine
Frontend: 'Copy share link' button present, generates public URL (https://project-review-120.preview.emergentagent.com/quote/...)
Frontend: Profitability widget visible for admin role - shows Client Total €20,684, Real Cost €0, Net Revenue €1,000, Margin % 4.83%, 'Low margin' warning, 'Manager discount applied -€500'
Frontend: Override editor displays 13 breakdown rows with edit/hide icons (pencil, eye/eye-slash)
Frontend: 'Compare' button present for side-by-side version comparison
Frontend: Comments section present with Internal/Shared visibility toggle
Frontend: Timeline section present with chronological events

Frontend: /quote/{share_token} renders public quote view with 'APPROVED BY YOU' badge, cost breakdown (5 line items), total $21,184, 'NOTES FROM YOUR MANAGER' section with shared comment, approval confirmation message
